heading: CAREER AND TECHNICAL EDUCATION
label: 44 CAREER AND TECHNICAL EDUCATION
notes: CodificationThe Carl D. Perkins Career and Technical Education Act of 2006, comprising this chapter, was originally enacted as part A of , , , known as the Vocational Education Act of 1963, and classified to sections 35 to 35n of this title. Part A of was subsequently redesignated as title I and amended generally by , , , further amended by , , ; , , ; , , ; , , ; , , ; , , , and reclassified to chapter 32 (§§ 1241–1393f) of this title.
